announcements.title: Spring 2026 curriculum update
announcements.body: EC ENGR 131A is now a prerequisite for EC ENGR 152B. Check the Samueli Announcement PDF for the latest curriculum tables.

announcements.title: CS 35L enrollment tips
announcements.body: COM SCI 35L fills quickly — have backup sections ready and watch the waitlist during pass 1.

questions.title: Is COM SCI 35L really that hard?
questions.body: Heard mixed things about the projects and time commitment. Worth taking sophomore year?

answers.body: Yes — start projects early. The autograder is strict but fair if you read the spec carefully.

questions.title: EC ENGR 152A vs 152B order?
questions.body: Can I take 152B before 152A if I have the new prereqs?

answers.body: Stick to the sequence in the Announcement — 152A before 152B unless your counselor approves an exception.

contributor_spotlight.bio: Built the UCLA CS interactive roadmap and verified 40+ course descriptions from the Samueli Announcement.
